question: छत्तीसगढमधील जिल्हे सूचीबद्ध करा ज्यांनी १९७० या वर्षात नक्की ५०० टन नाचणी आणि किमान काही बाजरी उत्पादन केले होते, वर्णक्रमानुसार क्रमवारी लावा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS >= 0.0 AND T2.FINGER_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS = 0.2 GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME
predicted_sql:
SELECT d.DIST_NAME
FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY d
JOIN DIM_YEAR y ON y.YEAR = 1970
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        p_major.GEOGRAPHY_ID,
        COALESCE(SUM(p_major.CHICKPEA_PRODUCTION_1000TONS + p_major.PIGEONPEA_PRODUCTION_1000TONS), 0) AS total_major,
        COALESCE(SUM(p_minor.MINOR_PULSES_PRODUCTION_1000TONS), 0) AS total_minor
    FROM FACT_PULSES_MAJOR p_major
    LEFT JOIN FACT_PULSES_MINOR p_minor ON p_major.GEOGRAPHY_ID = p_minor.GEOGRAPHY_ID
    JOIN DIM_YEAR y_major ON p_major.YEAR_ID = y_major.YEAR_ID
    WHERE y_major.YEAR = 1970
    GROUP BY p_major.GEOGRAPHY_ID
) p ON d.GEOGRAPHY_ID = p.GEOGRAPHY_ID
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        m.GEOGRAPHY_ID,
        COALESCE(SUM(m.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS + m.FINGER_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS), 0) AS total_millet
    FROM FACT_MILLETS m
    JOIN DIM_YEAR y_millet ON m.YEAR_ID = y_millet.YEAR_ID
    WHERE y_millet.YEAR = 1970
    GROUP BY m.GEOGRAPHY_ID
) m ON d.GEOGRAPHY_ID = m.GEOGRAPHY_ID
WHERE d.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh'
AND (p.total_major + p.total_minor) = 0.5
AND m.total_millet > 0
ORDER BY d.DIST_NAME;
